html:
الشكر الجزيل لكم .  ليس لدي اي مشكلة حاليا أنا فقط ذكرت ماحدث معي للإشادة بكم علي سرعة الحل المقدم من طرفكم وسرعة استجابتكم وتحملكم المسؤلية تجاه العملاء .
تعامل راقي وليس هدفكم المكسب فقط ولكن هدفكم الاول هو ارضاء العميل وهذا ذكاء منكم لأنكم بهذا الأسلوب سوف تكسبوا ثقة العملاء وبالتالي زيادة العملاء ويأتي المكسب مضاعف لاحقا . 
كلمة حق تقال ان نهج الإمارات الإسلامي يستحق ان يقتدي به جميع البنوك.

It could be a message from a "relative"... but it's a scam. 
Answer and win

You received a message from your friend urgently asking you to transfer a sum of money to his account, claiming there is an emergency. What should you do?

A. Transfer the amount immediately to help your friend
B. Verify the matter by calling your friend
C. Trust the message because it comes from your friend's account

To participate:
Answer correctly in the comments 
Mention two people 
Follow our account on X

The winner will be announced on May 5, 2026
Please visit https://t.co/4RkTsyGuDX for terms and conditions

Participation is limited to citizens of the United Arab Emirates or residents of the country who hold a valid ID card.

#AbuDhabiIslamicBank_Competition
post_highlights: Answer and win You received a message from your friend urgently asking you to transfer a sum of money to his account, claiming there is an emergency. • Transfer the amount immediately to help your friend B. • Verify the matter by calling your friend C.

post: probably the worst customer experience I’ve had in my life. Tried cancelling my cards. Have received 10+ phone calls from them trying to retain. Confirmed each time that I want to cancel (on call and on email confirmation). It’s been 4-5 months since I raised this complaint. No resolution yet. Impressed with how difficult they make this process. Wow!
